notes: scout the codebase, map structure, locate files, recon, investigate, survey, trace references, understand how something works — read-only reconnaissance on the cheapest tier
implement a feature, fix a bug, edit code, write code, refactor, patch, apply a change, build something — the general implementation lane
code review, audit a diff, critique a change, verify correctness, check quality, approve before merge
design the architecture, write a plan, decompose a spec, system design, high-level strategy, sequence the work — deep-reasoning tier
UI design, frontend, visual design, components, layout, styling, user experience, ux, look and feel
fleet kit mechanism, omp driver, nhq glue scripts, config routing, safety hooks, self-tests, infrastructure plumbing, capability router
research a topic, gather sources, web search, documentation lookup, read the literature, find information online, compare options
debug a hard problem, root-cause analysis, diagnose a failure, systematic debugging, why is this broken, reproduce a crash — deep-reasoning tier
